usage_modes.inherit: Use transforms emitted by the PCG Dungeon Marker flow for this mesh.
usage_modes.attach: Create this mesh from the raw marker transforms supplied by source_mesh.

meshes.prompt_hint: 墙沿；墙脚线；墙根压边；墙底装饰条；wall curb；wall base trim；baseboard
Curbstone01 wall-base trim emitted once for each physical wall side adjacent to a Room or Corridor Cell. Local -X faces that Cell; Room-Corridor shared walls intentionally receive opposing instances.
50% chance to attach a cross at the center of the wall; wall center cross
Mirrored wall01Arch1 copy for the back side of each doorway wall.
立柱相邻Ground归属placement传输点；房间或走廊；单格取Ground中心，同归属多格取中心点连线中点
在35%的PillarPlacement摆放火盆组；位置来自立柱相邻Ground中心或同房间/同走廊Ground中心连线中点；placement记录Room或Corridor归属
Deterministically keep 75% of indoor light candidates per room, with a minimum of two non-brazier lights in every room.
低密度冷色环境补光；保留主动暗区；ambient dungeon fill；无阴影；最小间距1000cm
